# Control Gestion operational calendar matrix 2026-2027

This matrix is generated from `scripts/monthly_input_layout_contract_015.py`.

Columns:

- `month_id`: operational month.
- `weekday_of_first_day`: calendar weekday of day 1.
- `week_count`: number of operational weeks assigned to the month.
- `S1..S5`: monday-sunday week ranges.
- `operational_coverage`: first operational week start through final operational week end.
- `required_calendar_months`: calendar folders needed to fully validate the operational month.
